LinksMenu.Name: Module Support
LinksMenu.Label: Links
LinksMenu.Hint: Open BM5E documentation, issue tracker, and support links.
LinksMenu.Title: Resources & Support
LinksMenu.SupportMessage: Toss a Coin to your Bugbear

Switch.Name: Enable Status HUD Sorting
Switch.Hint: When enabled, the status effects labels will also be shown and an opinionated sorting will take place!

SortingType.Name: Status Effects sorting
SortingType.Hint: Fill by rows (left -> right) or by columns (top -> bottom)

NumberColumns.Name: Number of columns
NumberColumns.Hint: Divide the HUD status effects number into this number of columns

Scale.Name: HUD scale
Scale.Hint: Scale the Status HUD as a percentage of its default size.

Filter.Name: Enable status filter
Filter.Hint: Show or hide the status filter input on the Token HUD.

AutoRollDamage.Name: Auto Roll Damage
AutoRollDamage.Hint: Automatically roll damage when an attack is successful.
AutoRollDamage.Prompt: You have already rolled damage for this attack. What do you want to do? Close dialog to cancel!

AutoPopout.Name: Pop use message out
AutoPopout.Hint: When enabled, the item use chat message will be popped out for Eldritch Blast lvl >= 5, Extra attacks, Guardian of Faith, Magic Missiles (modern rules), Scorching Ray, Spirit Guardians, Spiritual Weapon

ChatMessagesTooltips.Name: Show roll results on message buttons
ChatMessagesTooltips.Hint: When enabled, the Attack and Damage buttons in chat messages will show roll results.
